prompt: I'm deploying to AWS ECS and want the Infisical Agent to inject secrets as a sidecar container. We're using ECS task roles so I don't want to manage any credentials manually. How do I configure this?
assertions: Uses aws-iam auth type (not universal-auth with client-id/secret)
Shows correct auth config with identity-id field
Shows ECS task definition pattern with shared volume between agent and app containers
Uses correct template function (listSecrets or listSecretsByProjectSlug) with proper signature
Mentions exit-after-auth option for init-style sidecar pattern
Does not require manually managing any credentials or access keys
